_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Validate the link between collection requests and critical information requirements and priority intelligence requirements of leadership.
reference_document_element_description: Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone tracking, risk registers, budget status, and decision requests.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-S-007 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: LS-A-004 (LS, cosine: 0.465), RC-K-010 (RC, cosine: 0.441).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 3.6/10 (raw 0.359). Shared vocabulary: [requests]. DCWF-only terms [collection, critical, information, intelligence, leadership, link] vs WIDAI-only terms [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.863 (P=0.866, R=0.860). Balanced P/R — the 16-word DCWF element and 17-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.8%). "Validate the link between collection requests and critical information requireme" and "Skill in producing executive-level program status reporting, including milestone" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.476 > STS 0.359 (gap +0.117). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [requests] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 6.9%. Shared tokens: [requests]. DCWF-only: [collection, critical, information, intelligence, leadership, link]. WIDAI-only: [budget, decision, executive, level, milestone, producing].
